---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Apex
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're facing. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any design ideas, API sketches, or implementation details you have in mind.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they don't meet your needs.

## Use Case
Describe the specific use case this feature would enable. Who would benefit and how?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
